dashboard.qortino_runtime_title: QORTINO card shell hit a runtime snag.
dashboard.qortino_runtime_body: The rest of the dashboard is still safe. Refresh the Hub and if this keeps happening report it to the team.
dashboard.featured_q_apps_subtitle: Launch trusted community apps directly from your dashboard.
dashboard.profile_settings_description: Review your name and account identity.
dashboard.security_settings_description: Reveal and copy your private key only when absolutely needed.
dashboard.developer_settings_description: Enable developer tools and diagnostics for advanced testing.
dashboard.system_settings_description: Control notifications, motion, pinned apps, and blocked accounts.
dashboard.names_qapp_actions_hint: Buy, sell, and name-change actions should be handled in the Names Q-App.
dashboard.names_qapp_hint_suffix: Q-App for buying names, selling names, or changing your registered name.
dashboard.private_key_warning: Never share your private key. Anyone who has it could potentially control this wallet and its funds.
dashboard.private_key_hint: Decrypt your private key only when you need to recover or migrate this wallet.
dashboard.notifications_update_error: We could not update app notifications right now.
dashboard.wallet_unavailable_error: Wallet data is unavailable right now.
dashboard.wallet_password_required: Enter your wallet password to decrypt the private key.
dashboard.wallet_decrypt_error_with_message: We could not decrypt your wallet: {{message}}
dashboard.wallet_decrypt_error: We could not decrypt your wallet with that password.
dashboard.enable_dev_mode_desc: Unlock local developer surfaces, diagnostics, and testing tools across the Hub.
dashboard.dev_mode_tip: Tip: Once enabled, a new Developer Tools icon will appear in your sidebar. You might need to hover over the left edge to reveal it.
dashboard.reduce_app_notifications_desc: Turn on to mute desktop push notifications. Leave off for normal Hub alerts.
dashboard.reduce_ui_animations_desc: Turn on to minimize motion throughout the Hub. Leave off for the normal animated interface.
dashboard.pinned_qapp_backup_desc: Save your pinned Q-Apps to encrypted QDN settings so the same layout can follow you across devices.
dashboard.block_list_desc: Review blocked names and addresses, then unblock accounts when you are ready.
dashboard.privacy_mode_tooltip: Privacy Mode: Blurs sensitive info for screen sharing
dashboard.send_qort_subtitle: Transfer QORT to any registered name or address.

subscription.empty_body: 在支持订阅的 Q-App（例如 SubWire）中订阅创作者与社区。
